heading: Generate an Autocompletion Script
body:
**Bash:**BashTo learn how to generate the autocompletion script for Bash,
see [atlas completion bash](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-completion-bash).**Fish:**fishTo learn how to generate the autocompletion script for fish,
see [atlas completion fish](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-completion-fish).**Powershell:**PowerShellTo learn how to generate the autocompletion script for PowerShell,
see [atlas completion powershell](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-completion-powershell).**Zsh:**zshTo learn how to generate the autocompletion script for zsh,
see [atlas completion zsh](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-completion-zsh).
